channel.title: NovaPharm Healthcare Insights
channel.description: Regulatory, quality, oncology, supply-chain and technology perspectives from NovaPharm Healthcare.

item.title: Building a Compliance-First Pharmaceutical Distribution Model in the UK
item.description: A practical framework for designing a UK pharmaceutical distribution business in which authorisation, quality governance and commercial operations develop in the right order.

item.title: From Batch to Buyer: Designing More Traceable Pharmaceutical Supply Chains
item.description: A practical architecture for connecting product, batch, temperature, custody, order, customer and quality records without overstating blockchain or automation maturity.

item.title: GDP, QMS and the Practical Foundations of Reliable Pharmaceutical Distribution
item.description: How Good Distribution Practice and a proportionate Quality Management System turn pharmaceutical policies into controlled, reviewable daily operations.

item.title: Three-Pillar Sourcing: Direct GMP Partnerships, PLPI and European Buying Networks
item.description: How three distinct pharmaceutical sourcing channels can be governed as one portfolio to improve optionality without weakening quality or regulatory discipline.

item.title: What PLPI Means for Pharmaceutical Supply Resilience and Cost-Optimised Access
item.description: An evidence-led explanation of the UK parallel-import route, its operational requirements and the role it may play within a diversified pharmaceutical sourcing strategy.

item.title: Why Oncology Supply Chains Require Specialised Demand Forecasting
item.description: Why oncology demand is difficult to predict, which data and controls matter, and how a governed forecasting roadmap should support rather than replace pharmaceutical judgement.
